prompts.name: Extreme Close Up
prompts.text: Frame the subject in an extreme close-up focused on the eyes, mouth, or a key detail, with strong intimacy and clear texture.

prompts.name: Close Up
prompts.text: Frame the subject in a close-up that emphasizes facial expression, eye detail, and emotional readability.

prompts.name: Medium Close Up
prompts.text: Frame the subject from the chest or shoulders upward, balancing expression, clothing detail, and background context.

prompts.name: Medium Shot
prompts.text: Frame the subject from the waist upward with natural body language and enough environment to support the scene.

prompts.name: Cowboy Shot
prompts.text: Frame the subject from mid-thigh upward, showing posture, hands, outfit, and character presence.

prompts.name: Full Body Shot
prompts.text: Frame the full body clearly from head to toe, keeping pose, outfit, and silhouette readable.

prompts.name: Wide Shot
prompts.text: Use a wide shot that shows the full subject and meaningful surrounding environment.

prompts.name: Establishing Shot
prompts.text: Use an establishing shot that prioritizes the environment, scale, and sense of place while keeping the subject integrated.

prompts.name: Overhead Shot
prompts.text: Use an overhead view looking down on the scene, creating graphic composition and clear spatial layout.

prompts.name: Low Angle Hero Shot
prompts.text: Use a low-angle hero shot to make the subject feel powerful, dramatic, and visually dominant.

prompts.name: High Angle Cute Shot
prompts.text: Use a high-angle shot to create a softer, cuter, or more vulnerable impression while keeping anatomy natural.

prompts.name: Over Shoulder Shot
prompts.text: Use an over-the-shoulder shot to create narrative depth and the feeling of interaction with another subject or scene element.

prompts.name: POV Shot
prompts.text: Frame the image as a point-of-view shot that makes the viewer feel present inside the scene.

prompts.name: Silhouette Shot
prompts.text: Create a silhouette-focused shot using strong backlight, clear outline, and readable subject shape.

prompts.name: Reflection Shot
prompts.text: Compose the image using a mirror, window, water, or polished surface reflection as a key visual element.
